productDisplayName: Puma Men Court Attaque Black Shoes
description: German brand puma is known for its minimalistic design in high-end, high performance athletic shoes. A tennis shoe, this puma Court Attaque FS 3 is replete with features to enhance performance. Team this with Sports apparel when hitting the court or simply pair it with jeans and tees. Upper Synthetic upper with contrast coloured formstripes on the sides for durability and midfoot support Added overlay at the backfoot for durability and support Perforated forefoot for breathable comfort Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and fabric collar for in-step comfort and snug fit Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort, durability and impact protection Padded footbed for all-day comfort and shock absorption OrthoLite sockliner for more comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial function Outsole TPR outsole in herringbone pattern for absolute grip and traction Honeycomb lugs for added grip Suction point on the toe mound for better traction Puma branding and jumping cat as lugs on the midfoot for inner-arch support and grip Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
